specs: Demonstrate hex's hexagonal architecture enforcement with a multi-layer Rust CLI app. Domain layer has zero deps, ports define trait contracts, adapters implement them, composition root wires everything.

phases.name: domain
phases.description: Pure domain types — zero external dependencies

tasks.name: Domain value objects
tasks.description:
Create src/domain/mod.rs with pure value objects for a weather app. ZERO external dependencies — only std.

Include:
- pub struct Temperature { pub celsius: f64 } with methods: pub fn to_fahrenheit(&self) -> f64 and impl Display
- pub enum Condition { Sunny, Cloudy, Rainy, Snowy, Windy } with impl Display
- pub struct Weather { pub city: String, pub temp: Temperature, pub humidity: u8, pub condition: Condition } with impl Display
- pub struct DayForecast { pub date: String, pub high: Temperature, pub low: Temperature, pub condition: Condition }
- pub struct Forecast { pub city: String, pub days: Vec<DayForecast> } with impl Display that formats a table

Return ONLY the complete Rust source file.

phases.name: ports
phases.description: Trait interfaces — depend only on domain

tasks.name: Port traits

phases.name: adapters
phases.description: Concrete implementations — depend only on ports

tasks.name: Weather adapter + CLI adapter
tasks.description:
Create src/adapters/mod.rs implementing the port traits. Import from super::domain and super::ports ONLY.

Include:
- pub struct MockWeatherService; implementing WeatherService — generate deterministic mock data using city name byte sum as seed
- pub struct EnvCliParser; implementing CliParser — parse std::env::args() for: <city> [--forecast] [--fahrenheit]

IMPORTANT: Use the EXACT field names from the domain structs and port traits. Read P1.1 and P2.1 outputs before writing.

Return ONLY the complete Rust source file.
tasks.done_condition: File imports only from super::domain and super::ports, never from other adapters

phases.name: composition
phases.description: Composition root — the ONLY file that imports adapters

tasks.name: Composition root + main
tasks.done_condition: rustc --edition 2021 src/main.rs -o weather succeeds and ./weather London prints output
